kept.text: Replit helped an entrepreneur find investors and land meetings!

profile_bio.description: ceo @replit. civilizationist

quoted_tweet.text: This true. I built the pitchdeck in @Replit , it was awesome, but it didn't stop there! I told it I need to find investors to send it to, it gathered around 1897 investors, and walked me the process of buying a postmark plan and apollo plan. I bought them both, enriched data in apollo, and it created the script to send bulk emails to the investors we found. Whole process took about 2 hours.  I have meetings with 2 investors on Wednesday and Friday, and the whole thing happened Yesterday.

quoted_tweet.text:
You can build a full pitch deck in Replit without touching a single slide.

kept.text:
Most people think AI coding agents are magic. 

They're not. Every agent (Claude, Cursor, Replit) is built from the same parts: 

→ A model (the brain) 
→ A context window (short-term memory) 
→ Tools (the hands) 
→ A loop (think, act, observe, repeat) 
→ A harness (the rules) 

Once you see the structure, you can debug it.
